title: delphinium dictyocarpum subsp. uralense
intro: Delphinium dictyocarpum subsp. uralense, also known as the Ural delphinium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ural delphinium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ural delphinium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine in Russia and other parts of Eastern Europe.
